text: The wine cellar is stocked — inventory stays with the lease
These dining tables and high chairs come with the space
Ceilings are 3.5m — great for the chandelier fixture
The floor is reclaimed oak, refinished last year
Spotlights over the bar are on a dimmer circuit
The decorative painting on the back wall is staying
That downlight near the entrance flickers — needs fixing
Building was a jazz lounge in the 1970s before the current fit-out
